patches.name: Ultrawide Aspect Ratio (Camera Structs)
patches.description: All five code-immediate AR writes to camera struct fields +0x408 and +0x428. All five required for gameplay ultrawide.

sites.notes: D — mov [rbx+0x428], 1.7778f at 0x03FA3212. Required for gameplay UW (dropping this reverts gameplay to 16:9).

patches.name: Ultrawide Aspect Ratio (Viewport)
patches.description: Shadow-constant redirect for the pillarbox float at 0x065675C8. Site 1: splash/boot rdata float. Site 2: shadow slot at 0x065675DC (free zero slot +0x14 from site6) receives the UW AR. Site 6 itself (0x065675C8) is NOT patched — its 7 UI-centering callers must keep reading 1.7777 to avoid UI stretch. Only the mulss viewport-width caller is redirected to the shadow via site 3.

sites.notes: rdata float at 0x05D490C0 — drives splash/boot renderer.
Shadow slot at foff=0x065675DC (VA 0x1465687DC). Free zero slot +0x14 from site6. All 8 site6 callers redirect here.
Redirect caller 1 (movss xmm4) at foff=0x00ECB8FD → shadow
Redirect caller 2 (subss xmm0) at foff=0x0117905D → shadow
Redirect caller 3 (subss xmm0) at foff=0x011790AA → shadow
Redirect caller 4 (mulss xmm0) at foff=0x011790D8 → shadow
